news.t: Bitwise Announces Monthly Distributions for IMST, ICOI, IMRA, IGME, ICRC, and IETH
Bitwise Announces Monthly Distributions for IMST, ICOI, IMRA, and IGME
Net Asset Value Restatement for Bitwise GME Option Income Strategy ETF

overview.description: The Bitwise GME Option Income Strategy ETF (IGME) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund seeks to provide monthly income and capped gains on the GameStop stock (GME) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys. The actively managed fund uses both standardized exchange-traded and FLEX options. IGME was launched on Jun 9, 2025 and is issued by Bitwise.
